Index.title: Smart Document Tools
Index.description: Free online tools for document and image manipulation

Home.hero_subtitle: Simple, fast, and privacy-friendly. All files are processed locally in your browser. We never upload your sensitive documents to our servers.
Home.trending_subtitle: Highly specialized tools tailored for specific workflows.
Home.essential_subtitle: Standard formatting, conversion, and calculation tools.
Home.secure_desc: Files never leave your device. All processing is done locally in your browser ensuring complete privacy.
Home.fast_desc: No upload or download wait times. Processing happens instantly taking advantage of your local hardware.
Home.mobile_desc: Use all tools directly from your phone. No app installation required, works perfectly on any screen size.

LandConverter.title: Indian Land Measurement Converter
LandConverter.subtitle: Convert Bigha, Kattha, Dhur, and other regional units accurately based on state and district.
LandConverter.disclaimer_text: Local land measurement units like Bigha and Kattha are not standardized and can vary significantly even between neighboring villages. The values provided here represent standard state averages or specific district averages where known. Always verify with official local land records (Jamabandi/RoR) for legal transactions.
